creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Do you want to be a DSS SHARE Millionaire?

This Dubai Summer Surprises season, you have the chance to win 1 million SHARE points in Mall of the Emirates, City Centre Mirdif, City Centre Deira, City Centre Me‘aisem & City Centre Al Shindagha!

⭐️ To enter the draw:
* Spend AED 300 in participating stores
* Scan your receipts in SHARE app

🏆 There will be 5 winners! 

💰 Prize: 1 million SHARE points is equivalent to AED 100,000

🗓️ Until September 3, 2023

Tag your shopping buddies!
